title: Image To Image Outfit Breakdown Layout Transfer AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Outfit Breakdown Layout Transfer AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image outfit breakdown layout transfer for adult city commuter in layered neutral outfit, applying the uploaded reference breakdown composition to the uploaded outfit photo. Subject: adult city commuter in layered neutral outfit remains the main figure from the target outfit reference, with trench coat, knit vest, wide trousers, leather loafers, canvas tote isolated, labeled, and visually explained without changing the person or clothing identity. Scene: Clean fashion analysis board built from the first reference layout, using the second reference outfit as the actual wardrobe source and keeping the presentation editorial, practical, and readable. Composition: Preserve reference image 1 as the fixed outfit-breakdown composition: full-body or portrait anchor, item callouts, separated garment details, label blocks, arrows or leader lines, and balanced spacing around the target outfit. Signature Elements: Reference-layout transfer, target outfit preservation, item-by-item breakdown for trench coat, knit vest, wide trousers, leather loafers, canvas tote, garment cutouts, leader lines, clean labels, and editorial styling-board spacing. Style: Fashion editorial outfit decomposition board with precise visual hierarchy, neat clothing cutouts, clean annotation design, tasteful magazine styling, and high-end wardrobe analysis finish. Color Palette: Preserve the target outfit colors from the uploaded outfit photo while keeping the reference layout color discipline, clean background surfaces, restrained labels, and uncluttered fashion-board contrast. Lighting: Reference-preserving clean presentation light that keeps fabric texture, garment shapes, accessories, and item callouts legible. Typography: Short readable garment labels and concise outfit notes; text names the visible items without long paragraphs or random filler copy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
